name: claude-imgui-cpp
description: A single-plugin marketplace publishing the imgui-cpp Dear ImGui development plugin.

plugins.name: imgui-cpp
plugins.description: Dear ImGui (v1.92.x docking) development skill for Claude Code, with slash commands for bootstrap / locate / review / pin. Recommends modern C++23 idioms (RAII scope guards, std::expected, std::print).
